ph","children":[{"text":"那个副署长欧里斯总是派人跟着我，好烦！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"x月x日行动报告："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"证据居然都指向马维尔？这是我认识的马维尔吗，不会是什么同名同姓的人吧?"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽说以他的职位，监守自盗确实很方便……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"啊……好乱！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"x月x日行动报告："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"[删除]今天好累，报告以后再补。拜托了，未来的我！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"[删除]（虽然被涂黑，但字迹还是清晰可辨）"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"总算甩掉欧里斯的眼线了……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他是跟踪狂吗，为什么要天天跟着我?"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不过今天还是探视了一下马维尔的情况。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他还是那副闷葫芦的样子，连为自己辩解都说不出几句话，真叫人头大，想撬开他的脑袋看看里面装的到底是什么。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但以我的直觉来看，这家伙没有说谎，那么监守自盗的肯定另有其人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"唔……现在想想，他支支吾吾的样子也很不对劲，难道是因为当着警卫的面，不敢说太多？"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"好累啊，我不想猜了……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"x月x日行动报告："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"欧里斯那家伙果然有问题，事情变得越来越麻烦了……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"x月x日行动报告："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"多亏了「那边」的帮助，总算找到了欧里斯的罪证，这家伙跑不掉了！"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不过，这也不代表能让马维尔完全脱罪，我还得再想想……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"协查行动总结："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"圆满解决，没力气写报告了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这方面是马维尔擅长的领域，正好想个办法把他拐到协会来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"嗯，就这么办。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"协会调查负责人：夜离"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【关于协会年度工作汇报】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「哈啊——你在看什么呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"协会办公室内，夜离午睡醒来，发现自己新上任的助理马维尔正对着工作终端皱眉沉思，脸色十分凝重。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「在看你的工作总结···你未免写得太随意了吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"马维尔打开那份凌乱的《关于蜃都情报泄露事件的协查报告》，语气中带了点无奈。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「完全是你的日记，真正重要的内容一点都没提到。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我要怎么帮你做年度汇报……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那种东西随便啦，都交给你了，你一定可以的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"夜离瞥了一眼报告，好像想起了什么。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「协会没那么多规矩，好不容易脱离E.O.S.那地方，你还要用有限的生命去写无限的报告吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她企图用微笑蒙混过关，但马维尔并没有那么容易被糊弄。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我得提醒你，必要、整洁的文书工作是保持沟通效率的关键……喂！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"眼看马维尔即将开始长篇大论地讲道理，夜离假装自己接到了工作电话，飞快地离开了协会办公室。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"马维尔叹了口气，重新看向手中的报告。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"最初看见这份报告的标题时，那段遭到构陷、身陷图圄的记忆顿时扑面而来，令他室息。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"被切断所有希望的无助、对自己事业与理想的怀疑、对前方命运的恐惧……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不过一一值得庆幸的是，在自己跌落悬崖的时刻，有一双手，坚定地将自己从深渊中拉了起来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"有些事，并不是数据和逻辑能够解释清楚的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"想到这里，他再次打开报告，认真看起了夜离东拉西扯的记录。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但这一次，他忍不住笑了起来。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【关于推荐马维尔干员担任情报官的请示】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"E.O.S.安全防务署[2188]17号"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"尊敬的伦芙纳女士："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"根据上季度情报分析部的工作安排，结合马维尔干员近年来的工作表现，作为情报分析部主任，现郑重向您推荐马维尔干员作为蜃都情报六处情报官的优先候选人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"请允许我简短向您介绍马维尔干员的基本履历："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"马维尔，19岁，男性，现任情报分析部特别干员。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"于2186年2月加入情报分析部，经实习试用后，被全票破格提拔为情报分析部特别干员。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在供职期间，为情报分析部的各项任务提供了优秀的支援保障，并借助自己的能力，使得情报分析部的情报处理效率大大提升。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"尤其是马维尔干员自主研发的迭矩模型，经实践证明，误差率在5‰以内，现已成为情报部门的标准分析配置。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"2187年，在洛莱北方的事故调查行动中，马维尔干员独立承担了88%的数据分析工作，仅耗费32小时，就完成了对全部关键节点的预测，准确率高达99.8%，展现出极强的细节把控能力。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"此外，马维尔干员性格认真，办事风格严谨。这一优秀的品质，对于情报工作人员来说并不罕见，但马维尔干员在其中尤为突出。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在工作期间，始终保持着零失误的记录，至今还无人超越，以数据预测的眼光来看，未来也是如此。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"最后，也是最重要的一点一一他的好奇心极低，且绝对服从指挥，只关注工作范畴之内的情报，绝不会过问多余的事。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"经过慎重考虑，马维尔干员符合既定的优先遴选条件，是蜃都情报六处所需要的人才。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"恳请您慎重审，议。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"安全防务署情报分析部帕尔逊"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"2188年5月22日"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}}]}},{"key":"0.535cf4a2176168","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐搭配"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推条"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"|
